title: Specific Learning Disorder
content: Difficulties learning and using academic skills, as indicated by the presence of at least one of the following symptoms that have persisted for at least 6 months, despite the provision of interventions that target those difficulties: 1. Inaccurate or slow and effortful word reading; 2. Difficulty understanding the meaning of what is read; 3. Difficulties with spelling; 4. Difficulties with written expression; 5. Difficulties mastering number sense; 6. Difficulties with mathematical reasoning.
